days.title: Svg Layouts
days.description: SVG Layouts — schematic inline-SVG mockups of agent and code workspaces; takes carousel, CSS-variable theme system, and choreographed panel/streaming animations

days.title: Particles
days.description: Particles — soft dots drifting on multi-harmonic sinusoidal paths that pause and recoil on contact; floating variant control with a metaball mode that fuses blobs via additive blending and a contrast() alpha threshold
days.idea: Soft glowing dots drift on sinusoidal paths, pause on contact, then push apart

days.title: Layout Playground
days.description: Layout Playground — a low-fidelity sandbox for layout-system exploration; macOS-style shell with a floating sidebar, centered canvas, and tool window, all wireframed to focus on structure

days.title: Layout Depth
days.description: Layout Depth — depth-model variant of the layout playground; raised central card with side panels dissolved into the background so only their icons float on the shell, plus a drag-to-resize right window
days.idea: Wireframe app shell where layout depth comes from shadow and contrast, not 3D

days.title: Ascii Sheet Documentation
days.description: ASCII Sheet Documentation — promotional component showcase for a fixed ASCII texture and backdrop-filter banner, with scroll-reactive use cases, presets, and config snapshot

days.title: Ascii Sheets Docs
days.description: ASCII Sheets — promotional showcase for the ASCII sheet primitive: hero with auto-cycling filters, twelve live use-case tiles (header, modal, toast, divider, drawer, image-reveal, marquee, tooltip, etc.), five-formula gallery, and glyph + palette rails that retheme the hero on click

days.title: Idle States
days.description: Idle States — eight visual interpretations of idle/patience as a 2×2 typology across two pages (ambient + instrumented): breath, caret, drift, lean-toward, hover, orbit, listening bars, elapsed counter; each paired with claim/signal/motion/risk metadata, switched via a floating pill dock
days.idea: Eight visual interpretations of idle — present without proactive — as a typology

concepts.primary: Temporal (slow loops, decoupled rhythms, elapsed time)

days.title: Network — Multi-Relationship Graph
days.description: Network — D3 force-directed graph with four relationship types (follows, friends, mentions, blocked) encoded by color, width, dash, and arrow; same-pair edges fan out as symmetric quadratic curves and a legend toggles each layer, reheating the simulation so the layout re-settles
days.idea: Force-directed graph where each of four relationship types (follows / friends / mentions / blocked) is encoded as its own visual layer, and multiple relationships between the same pair fan out as offset curves.

concepts.primary: Network (multi-relational graph, edge encoding, force-directed layout)

days.title: Lens Wave
days.description: Lens Wave — WebGL fragment shader that warps a live text texture through layered sine displacement, non-uniform lens scaling, chromatic aberration, and a tinted multi-tap bloom; floating control island edits the text, snap freezes a frame onto a sweater mockup, and export composites the full-res PNG
days.idea: Text rendered as a deformable material — warped, color-split, and lit from within. A WebGL fragment shader applies layered sine displacement, non-uniform lens scaling, chromatic aberration, and soft bloom to a Canvas 2D text texture. The result doubles as a product mockup tool: snap a frame, composite it over a garment, export to PNG.

concepts.primary: Visual (text as deformable material, optics simulation, glow)

days.title: Z Axis
days.description: Z-Axis — nine micro-explorations of depth as a UI material (two-state toggle, stacked deck, modal lift, z-scroll, hover grid, pressed state, layer explode, parallax cursor, notification arrival) switched via a floating island controller with prev/next, dot indicators, and arrow-key navigation

days.title: Video index — Playwright-driven gallery
days.description: Video Index — a grid of every previous sketch as a 3–4 second looping clip, recorded by a headless Chromium running Playwright scenarios that an LLM agent authored from each sketch's source; ffmpeg trims warmup and transcodes to MP4 + poster, mobile gets single-stream centered playback, reduced-motion gets a posters-only fallback
days.idea: An index page where every previous sketch is a 720×720 looping video preview that plays on hover. Each clip is recorded by a headless Chromium that an LLM agent has scripted to interact with the sketch the way a curious viewer would.

concepts.primary: Workflow / Tooling (browser automation, video capture, agent-authored interaction)
concepts.secondary: Gallery UI (poster→video swap, lazy video loading, disabled-state styling)

days.title: Id Card
days.description: ID Card — living credential for Mantas Lilis with a distant particle void, animated flow-field surface, mouse-reactive 3D tilt and sheen, randomized serial, generated barcode, and issued date stamp
